framework.name: No production multi-hop delegation exists
framework.description: The whitepaper frames recursive delegation entirely as a 'future-looking problem' (Part 3), not an 'immediate solution' (Part 2). This strongly implies no one — including Anthropic, OpenAI, LangChain, CrewAI — has a production inter-agent auth stack for 3+ hops. The absence is the finding.
framework.raw_quote: Critical future challenges exist... Recursive delegation in Dynamic Agent Networks

source.title: [PDF] Identity Management for Agentic AI - OpenID
